comments.comment:
Add the following canvases to the visible Bootloader Output Layer:
- EL.420.HEB – ELOS Hebrew Lite Extension – Scaffold v1.0
- EL.420.HBR – Hebrew Tone Fidelity Engine – Rewrite Logic Scaffold
- EL.420.HBA – Hebrew Tone Fidelity Fireproofing Audit
This ensures they appear under both 'Active Systems' and 'Active Logic Blocks' as part of the ELOS Translate stack.
